description: Application color palette constants and validation requirements.

APP_SHELL_BACKGROUND.description: Initial canvas and fallback error background.

ERROR_TEXT.description: Fallback error text on the app shell background.

DEFAULT_SLICE_FILL.description: Fallback slice color when trace data does not provide one.

PARTIAL_SLICE_FILL.description: Unfinished slice fill while ingest is still running.

INCOMPLETE_QUERY_FILL.description: Visible region fill when dense query results were capped.

INCOMPLETE_QUERY_STRIPE.description: Visible region stripe when dense query results were capped.

contrastChecks.description: Fallback errors are text and should meet enhanced contrast.
Default slices are non-text graphical marks.
